address: 71 Chesterfield Road, Ponders End, Enfield, EN3 6BE
lead_profile_text: Moving abroad; wants property managed remotely. Owns outright — no mortgage. Monthly running costs ~£252/month (gas £42, WiFi £35, council tax £175). One room may be missing a bed — needs confirming via photos. Departing imminently; speed-to-live is the critical conversion factor.
emotional_profile: Pragmatic and financially clear-headed. No mortgage means all net income is pure profit with no debt to service. Motivated to maximise idle asset value while abroad. Setup barrier is minimal (photos + key safes only). Primary need is confidence in remote management capability.
delay_trigger_phrases: One room may be missing a bed
delay_timeline: Departing imminently; key safes needed before departure; agreement signing is the next trigger
green_light_trigger_phrases: July peak net ~£2,343 — genuine urgency to sign before departure
Minimal setup: photos + key safes only

top_objections.text: Whether projections are achievable given moderate local competition (~19 reviews per listing average)
top_objections.zac_response: Moderate competition, but National Rail 3 min walk and hospital nearby provide non-leisure demand; ramp-up acknowledged honestly

top_objections.text: Ramp-up period — 6-10 months to full figures, 10-15% below initially
top_objections.zac_response: Acknowledged and framed honestly; break-even is 1-2 months given no mortgage

top_objections.text: One room may be missing a bed — needs photo assessment before setup confirmed
top_objections.zac_response: Stayful can order furniture and handle setup if needed

top_questions.text: How quickly can the property go live?
top_questions.answer: ~2-3 weeks from signed agreement; first bookings expected within 3 days to 1 week of going live

top_questions.text: How does Stayful manage the property when I'm abroad?
top_questions.answer: Full remote management — Slack channel, central booking calendar, monthly income statement on 1st, payout between 1st and 5th; owner doesn't need to be in the country

what_moved_them: No mortgage means all net income above £252/month running costs is clear profit — zero floor risk
Minimal setup cost (photos ~£200-300, key safes ~£30 for two)
Fast go-live timeline (2-3 weeks from agreement, first bookings within 72 hours)
Full remote management capability — Slack channel, monthly statements, calendar visibility

conversion_gaps.gap: Photo assessment needed to confirm all rooms are ready
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Olalekan to send property photos; Stayful assesses furniture and confirms setup needs before signing

conversion_gaps.gap: Competition achievability is a mild concern (moderate market, ~19 reviews/listing)
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Transport links (National Rail 3 min) and hospital proximity provide non-leisure demand to offset seasonal leisure competition

zac_income_intro: Gross revenue ~£37,608/year (£3,134/month); net ~£19,554 (~£1,630/month). Worst month February ~£1,132 net; best month July ~£2,343 net. Ramp-up: 6-10 months to full figures.
zac_reassurance_phrases: No mortgage means break-even is just 1-2 months — after that everything is clear profit
First bookings expected within 3 days to 1 week of going live
You don't need to be in the country — we handle everything and you get a monthly statement on the 1st
